query:
SELECT salesPerson, COUNT(*) as orderCount, SUM(courseAmount) as totalSales 
FROM orders 
WHERE salesPerson IN ('嘟嘟', '土豆') 
GROUP BY salesPerson;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user SQg17LQaPsV51m8.32b9e2c038f9 --database jtCSa4Dgw9WMNzinVreVWF --execute SELECT salesPerson, COUNT(*) as orderCount, SUM(courseAmount) as totalSales 
FROM orders 
WHERE salesPerson IN ('嘟嘟', '土豆') 
GROUP BY salesPerson;
